title: Publish initial Taskulus release to PyPI
description: Manually upload the first release to PyPI to create the project so trusted publishing can take over.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_notes:
Preparing manual PyPI upload to create project for trusted publisher.
Manual twine upload succeeded; PyPI project created at https://pypi.org/project/taskulus/0.1.0/. Trusted publisher can now be configured.
